_comment: Time-Event: Spirit Spring Birth. Per time directive: the world is not static. Trigger: decennial, scope: local, duration: 90 days. Prime Directive: event occurs objectively; player perception determines whether they witness it.
name: Spirit Spring Birth
note: Spirit springs birth naturally; create new ecologies.

simulation_notes.world_breathes: The world changes whether or not the player acts; a player who returns 200 years later will barely recognize it.

perception_tiers.foundation_establishment: Perceives the event's scope and effects.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Perceives the event's place in the larger pattern.
